body:
## ملخص — V13 Consolidation & Master Merge Kit

V13 يضيف طبقة **توحيد وتشغيل** فوق V1–V12، تحوّل عشرات الأوامر المتفرقة إلى command surface موحد عبر `Makefile` وسكربتات مركزية.

### ما الجديد في هذا الـ PR

**طبقة Consolidation الجديدة كليًا:**
- `consolidation/MASTER_MERGE_PLAN_AR.md` — خطة دمج V1–V12 بدون فوضى
- `consolidation/MASTER_OPERATING_GUIDE_AR.md` — التشغيل اليومي/الأسبوعي/الشهري
- `consolidation/FINAL_FOUNDER_HANDOFF_AR.md` — تسليم تنفيذي للفاوندر
- `consolidation/LAUNCH_DECISION_FRAMEWORK_AR.md` — متى GO / NO-GO / Controlled Preview

**سكربتات V13:**
- `dealix_v13_master_readiness.py` — يتحقق من 15 ملفًا حرجًا من V1–V13
- `dealix_launch_decision_report.py` — يعطي قرار GO/NO-GO (Score: 9/9 ✅)
- `dealix_master_inventory.py` — inventory كامل لجميع الملفات
- `dealix_workflow_inventory.py` — يفحص GitHub Actions وصلاحياتها
- `dealix_migration_order_check.py` — يتحقق من ترتيب migrations
- `dealix_v13_daily_run.py` — يشغل فحوص V13 الأساسية يوميًا

**Makefile — 10 أوامر موحدة جديدة:**
```bash
make dealix-master-readiness   # فحص الملفات الحرجة
make dealix-launch-decision    # قرار GO/NO-GO
make dealix-inventory          # inventory كامل
make dealix-workflows          # فحص GitHub Actions
make dealix-migrations         # ترتيب migrations
make dealix-revenue-dashboard
make dealix-scale-dashboard
make dealix-agent-control
make dealix-proof-index
make dealix-board-metrics
```

**GitHub Actions:**
- `.github/workflows/dealix-v13-master-consolidation.yml` — يشغل فحوص V13 عند التغيير على `scripts/`, `consolidation/`, `Makefile` (صلاحية: `contents: read`)

**ملفات V1–V12 ناقصة تم إضافتها:**
- `db/migrations/0001–0003` (revenue machine, multi-tenant SaaS, prod bridge)
- `compliance/OUTBOUND_AND_DATA_POLICY_AR.md`
- `proof/PROOF_VAULT_SYSTEM_AR.md`
- `frontend/src/app/api/health/route.ts`
- `docs/launch/DEALIX_FULL_LAUNCH_MASTER_PLAN_AR.md`
- `revenue-sprint/`, `scale/`, `implementation/`
- `data/{crm,revenue,agents,proof}/` — بيانات seed نموذجية (لا PII)

## نتائج الفحوصات

```
✅ dealix_v13_master_readiness  → OK: 15/15 critical files present
✅ dealix_launch_decision_report → Score: 9/9 — CONTROLLED PREVIEW GO
✅ dealix_migration_order_check  → migrations 0001–0003 present
⚠️  dealix_workflow_inventory    → 14 workflows without explicit permissions (موروثة من V1–V12، للمراجعة بعد الدمج)
```

## قرار الإطلاق

> **CONTROLLED PREVIEW GO** — أول 5 عملاء managed، ليس self-serve SaaS واسع

## خطوات ما بعد الدمج

1. شغّل `make dealix-master-readiness` للتأكيد
2. راجع الـ 14 workflow التي أشار إليها `make dealix-workflows` لإضافة `permissions: contents: read`
3. أطلق Controlled Preview لأول 5 عملاء
4. سجّل أول فاتورة وأول proof report

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_018tvxyp57LHGq8nC9rBrKhF)_

commits.messageBody:
Adds the V13 consolidation layer on top of V1–V12, providing a unified
command surface, master readiness checks, and launch decision tooling.

New in V13:
- consolidation/: Master Merge Plan, Operating Guide, Founder Handoff,
  Launch Decision Framework (all bilingual AR)
- scripts/: dealix_v13_master_readiness, dealix_launch_decision_report,
  dealix_master_inventory, dealix_workflow_inventory,
  dealix_migration_order_check, dealix_v13_daily_run
- .github/workflows/dealix-v13-master-consolidation.yml (permissions: read)
- Makefile: 10 new V13 make targets (dealix-master-readiness,
  dealix-launch-decision, dealix-inventory, dealix-workflows,
  dealix-migrations, dealix-revenue-dashboard, dealix-scale-dashboard,
  dealix-agent-control, dealix-proof-index, dealix-board-metrics)
- ops/MASTER_COMMAND_CENTER_AR.md
- qa/V13_CONSOLIDATION_QA_CHECKLIST_AR.md
- data/consolidation/v13_manifest.json

Also includes missing V1–V12 required files detected by the readiness check:
- compliance/OUTBOUND_AND_DATA_POLICY_AR.md
- proof/PROOF_VAULT_SYSTEM_AR.md
- db/migrations/0001–0003 (revenue machine, multi-tenant SaaS, prod bridge)
- docs/launch/DEALIX_FULL_LAUNCH_MASTER_PLAN_AR.md
- frontend/src/app/api/health/route.ts
- frontend/src/app/[locale]/diagnostic/page.tsx
- implementation/PRODUCTION_IMPLEMENTATION_BRIDGE_AR.md
- revenue-sprint/FIRST_5_CLIENTS_SPRINT_AR.md
- scale/SCALE_MASTER_PLAN_AR.md
- data/{crm,revenue,agents,proof}/ seed data (synthetic, no PII)

Launch Decision: CONTROLLED PREVIEW GO — Score 9/9
Scope: first 5 managed clients, no self-serve SaaS yet

https://claude.ai/code/session_018tvxyp57LHGq8nC9rBrKhF
commits.messageHeadline: feat(v13): add Dealix Consolidation & Master Merge Kit (V13)

title: feat(v13): Dealix Consolidation & Master Merge Kit
